properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 C5 V6 V7 C5 C8 V9 V10 C5 C8 V11

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: A thousand generations Falling down in worship, To sing the song of ages to the Lamb

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: And all who've gone before us And all who will believe, Will sing the song of ages to the Lamb.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Your name is the highest Your name is the greatest Your name stands above them all.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: All thrones and dominions, All powers and positions, Your name stands above them all.

verse.name: C5
verse.lines: And the angels cry, Holy All creation cries, Holy You are lifted high, Holy Holy forever.

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: If you've been forgiven, If you've been redeemed, Sing the song forever to the Lamb.

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: If you walk in freedom, If you bear His name, Sing the song forever to the Lamb. We'll sing the song forever and amen.

verse.name: C8
verse.lines: Hear your people sing, Holy. To the King of Kings, Holy You will always be, Holy Holy forever.

verse.name: V9
verse.lines: Your name is the highest, Your name is the greatest, Your name stands above them all.

verse.name: V10
verse.lines: All thrones and dominions, All powers and positions, Your name stands above them all.

verse.name: V11
verse.lines: You will always be, Holy Holy forever.
